variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost of sales D&A row appears in the operating section. The visible D&A disclosure is a separate operating-expense line at the SG&A/overhead level, not clearly part of the selected COGS row.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A row above financial items, presented at the same level as other operating expense lines and therefore outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket; should be added separately. Preferred over components to avoid double counting.

Appears to be a component of the summary row 'Amortization and depreciation', so should not be selected if the summary row is used.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists of 'Compensation and benefits', 'Research and development', and 'Other Operating Expenses'. 'Amortization and depreciation' is disclosed separately at the same operating-expense level, so it should be added separately later. Summary row chosen instead of component D&A rows to avoid double counting.
